exemplar.title: Does our knowledge depend on our interactions with other knowers?

detailedExemplarData.title: Does our knowledge depend on our interactions with other knowers?

strengths: Identification and contextualization of three highly specific real-world objects, moving clearly beyond generic examples
Explicit, consistently developed links to the IA prompt with engagement of TOK concepts (authority bias, linguistic capital, objectivity, perspective) and named thinkers
Consideration of counterclaims for each object, evidencing awareness of multiple viewpoints
weaknesses: Inconsistent and incomplete citation formatting (missing publication details, HTML artifacts in footnotes)
Occasional lapses in precision when reconciling Object 3âs independence with the prompt
Minor gaps in theoretical elaboration (e.g. truncated discussion of Bourdieuâs linguistic capital)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs work clearly meets the descriptor for the 9â10 band. Three concrete objects are situated in authentic contexts, and each is linked to the prompt (âDoes our knowledge depend on our interactions with other knowers?â) with coherent, theoretically grounded explanations. The effective use of TOK concepts and named thinkers, along with brief engagement of counterclaims, demonstrates a mature understanding of knowledge issues. Minor formatting and citation inconsistencies, plus a few under-developed analytical points (notably around the nuance of Object 3âs independence and the completion of certain theoretical discussions), prevent a perfect 10. Overall, the quality of analysis and justification justifies a top-band score of 9.

annotations.comment: The thesis question is articulated clearly, establishing a focused exploration for the exhibition.
Referencing the specific IA prompt number is useful, but linking the prompt number to the title could enhance clarity for the reader.
The student identifies a very specific real-world object, satisfying the requirement for specificity and context.
The description establishes a clear connection to the prompt, but could be strengthened by including an in-text example from the screenshot.
The explanation effectively links classification choices to shaping knowledge, but would benefit from referencing user data or consumer feedback to support the claim.
The invocation of Foucault demonstrates theoretical grounding, but the link to power structures could be elaborated with a specific example from the fashion industry.
The footnote lacks full bibliographic detail; include authorâs name, work title, year, and page to meet referencing standards.
The concept of authority bias is introduced appropriately, yet defining it in TOK terms or connecting to another AOK could deepen the analysis.
The counterclaim offers balance, but it remains underdeveloped; consider providing evidence or a real-world example showing consumersâ existing preferences.
The concluding statement reiterates the link to the prompt effectively, but could be more succinct to maintain analytical momentum.
Including the actual chat screenshot is a strong choice for contextual authenticity; ensure that specific lines are referenced in the commentary.
The explanation of slang usage connects well to shared culture; adding a brief mention of how outsiders interpret these terms would enrich the exploration.
The paragraph ties language usage to knowledge construction, but consider explicitly linking Wittgensteinâs language games concept to the expressions in your chat.
This section ends abruptly due to truncation (âtheory of â¦â); ensure the discussion of Bourdieuâs linguistic capital is completed for coherence.
The footnote for Wittgenstein follows the same incomplete format; adopt a consistent citation style with full details.
The Bourdieu reference clarifies the social implications of language; integrate a brief example illustrating linguistic capital in practice.
The counterargument is well-articulated, showing awareness of multiple perspectives; consider referencing a TOK concept such as identity or community.
The summary links objects back to the prompt neatly; you might further contrast this with earlier objects to highlight differences in knowledge dependency.
The bibliographic entry appears to contain an HTML artifact (â<sup>4</sup>â); clean these to present a professional citation.
Object 3 is introduced with clarity, specifying its nature and context. The shift to a contrasting perspective is effective.
The discussion of independence presents an interesting nuance, yet the link to the prompt could be sharpened by explicitly naming how creativity diverges from interaction-based knowledge.
The personal example anchors the analysis in real experience; adding a direct excerpt could provide stronger evidence of unique perspective.
The citation for Goodman lacks publication details and format consistency; standardize this entry in line with other references.
The introduction of Descartes and Piaget provides philosophical breadth; the interplay of these theories could be more explicitly contrasted.
The explanation of Descartes is accurate, but including a brief quote or paraphrase would demonstrate stronger engagement with the text.
The counterclaim regarding external prompts is balanced; linking this more directly to Piagetâs constructivist framework can add theoretical rigor.
The concluding link to the prompt for Object 3 is coherent, but reflecting on how this contrasts with Objects 1 and 2 could deepen the final synthesis.
The Descartes footnote should specify the edition and publisher year to avoid ambiguity in referencing.
The works cited list is comprehensive; ensure consistency in formatting (e.g., date formats, italicization) across all entries.
The Descartes entry is properly cited but missing the location of the publisher; include city and ensure uniformity.
The web source citation for Goodman lacks access date and proper URL formatting; add these for completeness.
Including a URL for Wittgensteinâs eBook is helpful; consider verifying the link and presenting a formatted DOI if available.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
